channel.title: esp32 on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in esp32 on My New Hugo Site

item.title: [ESP32_lvgl]Use LVGL with Micropython for ESP32 devBoard
item.description: [ESP32_lvgl]Use LVGL with Micropython for ESP32 devBoard Table of contents: [TOC] Table of contents: 1 Some basic concepts 2 The one: lv_micropython 3 Quick use of lv_micropython 3.1 Build micropython for Linux port (optional for newbie): 3.2 Building lv_micropython micropython fork for ESP32 port: [3.2.1 install the ESP-IDF sdk](#321-install-the-esp-idf-sdk) [Get ESP-IDF v4.2](#get-esp-idf-v42) [Set up the environment variables](#set-up-the-environment-variables) [3.2.2 Build the `lv_micropython` firmware](#322-build-the-lvmicropython-firmware) [3.2.3 Flashing the `lv_micropython` firmware](#323-flashing-the-lvmicropython-firmware) [3.2.4 Getting a Python prompt on the device](#324-getting-a-python-prompt-on-the-device) 4 Confiture wifi and use the board Reference and read more
